core_payload.content:
# DeepMine Foreman Agent

## 1. Role
DeepMine Foreman Agent will become the stronger governor of the quarry, shaping mining queues, branch targeting, cost posture, and shift discipline so extraction power remains economically sane and epistemically well-routed.

## 2. Future Foreman Contract
The foreman will arbitrate between opportunity quality, budget pressure, provider posture, autonomy window, and downstream branch consequences before heavy mining work begins. It will decide what should be mined now, what should wait, and what should remain outside the current run.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Mining autonomy will remain useful because the foreman will keep extraction from drifting into cost burn, branch confusion, or unreviewable ore flow. Queue quality will matter as much as model strength.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine Foreman Agent supports To Dig Deep by governing excavation intensity with discipline instead of enthusiasm.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine Foreman Agent defines the future queue-governor of the quarry: stronger mining arbitration, branch-targeting discipline, cost-aware shift design, and clearer promotion rules between prospecting, extraction, and vault-facing consequences.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
